---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem it solves

What pain point does this address? Be specific.

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed, and why this one is better.

## Rough effort

A gut estimate — does this touch the indexer, retriever, both, or neither?

- [ ] Indexer (`indexer/`, `src/glance_search/{embedder,model,index_store}.py`)
- [ ] Retriever (`retriever/`, `src/glance_search/pipeline.py`)
- [ ] CLI / scripts (`scripts/`)
- [ ] Streamlit (`app/`)
- [ ] Tests (`tests/`)
- [ ] Docs (`README.md`, `report/`)

## Additional context

Anything else — references, prior art, related work.
